trans-unit.source: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D (v17 and above).
trans-unit.target: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D (v17 and above).

trans-unit.source: … pass parameters to a dialog or subform?
trans-unit.target: … pass parameters to a dialog or subform?

trans-unit.source: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D ({version} and above)
trans-unit.target: Sorry, this "How do I" (HDI) example must be used with a newer version of 4D ({version} and above)

trans-unit.source: Do not attempt to open this HDI in design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.
trans-unit.target: Do not attempt to open this HDI in design mode using this version; if you do so, forms and/or methods could be altered because of missing functionality.

trans-unit.source: The object is passed to the DIALOG command
trans-unit.target: The object is passed to the DIALOG command

trans-unit.source: Updated object after modification by the user in the dialog
trans-unit.target: Updated object after modification by the user in the dialog

trans-unit.source: It's now possible to pass parameters in an object to a form using the DIALOG command. Any property of this object will then be available from within the form context via the Form command.
trans-unit.target: It's now possible to pass parameters in an object to a form using the DIALOG command. Any property of this object will then be available from within the form context via the Form command.

trans-unit.source: When the users close the dialog, the values they entered are available in the calling method via the object passed in parameter.
trans-unit.target: When the users close the dialog, the values they entered are available in the calling method via the object passed in parameter.

trans-unit.source: Click on flags to change language in subforms:
trans-unit.target: Click on flags to change language in subforms:

trans-unit.source: InvoiceAddress is accessible in the subform using the Form command
trans-unit.target: InvoiceAddress is accessible in the subform using the Form command

trans-unit.source: InvoiceAddress is a C_Object variable bound to the subform below
trans-unit.target: InvoiceAddress is a C_Object variable bound to the subform below

trans-unit.source: When you update the Label object, the subform is updated automatically
trans-unit.target: When you update the Label object, the subform is updated automatically

trans-unit.source: Thanks to the new Form command, the object passed in the parameter to the DIALOG command will be updated with the values entered by the user.
trans-unit.target: Thanks to the new Form command, the object passed in the parameter to the DIALOG command will be updated with the values entered by the user.
